Video.summary: Marlon claims he caught Bernard molesting his own nephew two years ago! Bernard and his sister accuse Marlon of lying! Later, Tarone found out his sister’s boyfriend Donald molested their daughter. Donald says he mistook her for her aunt Felitha!
Video.title: An Unexpected Confession

Video.summary: Chris wants his wife Ariel to quit stripping, but she refuses. Next Jenna will tell her boyfriend, Tim, about her "banana split" act. Then twins Amber and Heather perform together on stage, but off stage they are fighting over the same man.
Video.title: Sexy Strippers Exposed!

Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family business…they're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: Victoria says Dewayne harasses her, calls her horrible names and is physically abusive toward her; wedding plans are on hold until Trenell can pass a lie detector test.
Video.title: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Image.alt: Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?
Hidden Camera: How Does He Really Treat You?

Video.summary: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend, Dee, for months to become a stripper and star in adult films. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping their sex sessions and broadcasting them over the Internet!
Video.title: My Secret Will Shock You!

Video.summary: Today we're exposing the sexy lives of porn stars and those who seek to become them.
Video.title: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2

Image.alt: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star 2

Video.summary: Khadisa thinks her boyfriend is cheating with her sister. He admits to cheating in the past, but not now.
Video.title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

Image.alt: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

Video.summary: Kerenina and Clay have a four-month-old son, but Clay cannot deny his suspicions that the child might actually have been fathered by their 71 year old roommate, William.
Video.title: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Image.alt: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Video.summary: John's one moment of weakness may cost him everything; Antonio meets his online crush; Paige tries to make her boyfriend forgive her for cheating by offering him a threesome.
Video.title: WCW: Women Crushed Wednesday

Video.summary: Demetrius cheated on Aleesha with her sister Keshia and also a stripper named Natalie. Then, Kahari's here to reveal to his girlfriend Jasmine that not only is he bi-sexual, but he's also been cheating on he with a transsexual named.
Video.title: Transtastic Confessions

Video.summary: Tracy and Allen live in a car. Her family is here to convince her to live with them and go back to school.
Video.title: We Live In A Car

Video.summary: Are the rumors true that her man is sleeping with her sister? Will Bryant take cheater Jalissa back?
Video.title: Sisters At War!

Video.summary: Chris cheated with his best friend's wife. Now she’s pregnant. Shortee confesses he’s cheating.
Video.title: Return of the Wild Guests

Video.summary: Will Heather take Dan back? Ginny wants Tim back! Shenidia won't let another woman steal her man!
Video.title: Your Man Wants Me!

Video.summary: Mistie meets the other woman! Jose's 2 guys will find out the truth! Antjuan hates his girlfriend's job.
Video.title: Candid Confessions

Video.summary: Mary Jane has a secret to reveal to George. For the past 6 months, she''s been cheating on him with a woman! Then, Tanya reveals to her husband that she’s in love with Sheri!
Video.title: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Image.alt: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Video.summary: Today's guests say that they are on a mission of sexual exploration. They are here to venture over to the other side and fulfill their wildest sex fantasies.
Video.title: Sex Fantasies Fulfilled

Video.summary: After their sex life hit the dumps, Andrew searched for satisfaction and found it with his girlfriends sister! Then Desi will do anything to keep Melissa from leaving her behind, but sleeping with her cousin was not something she planned on!
Video.title: Your Sister Gave It Up!

Video.summary: Jeda says that she's desperately in love with Steven. They were engaged until her sister Kayla stepped in and stole her man. Then, Ashley says that things in her life would be great if it wasn't for her boyfriend Phil's ex girlfriend Shanna.
Video.title: Sabotaged!

Video.summary: Bailey says she's proud that she's a prostitute but her boyfriend isn’t. Next Tina learns how her man, Lewis, is earning his income. Then..."Blimp the Pimp" is here today to tell his girlfriend that he wants her to go to work for him.
Video.title: Baby, I'm A Hooker

Video.summary: Perry and Stephanie started having an affair while Ashley was at rehab. Now Ashley is here to confront Perry for not taking responsibility for their daughter. Then, after they split up, Amanda started accusing James' new girlfriend of being abusive.
Video.title: Angry Moms Confront

Video.summary: Brandon spent time in jail after being accused of sexually abusing his niece. He maintains his innocence and claims that this isn’t the first time his niece has accused someone of molestation! Was she coached by his sister’s boyfriend Billy?
Video.title: Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Image.alt: Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Video.summary: Holly says her mother is envious of her and has made up accusations that she has been sleeping with her stepfather; Jovanni reacts to his girlfriend's ironclad proof that he is cheating.
Video.title: Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?

Image.alt: Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?
Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?
Are My Husband and Daughter Having Sex?

Video.summary: Stephanie gave birth to a baby boy and she believes Brandon is the father.
Video.title: I Know About The Affair, But Is He The Father?

Image.alt: I Know About The Affair, But Is He The Father?
I Know About The Affair, But Is He The Father?
I Know About The Affair, But Is He The Father?

Video.summary: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck.
Video.title: Am I Living a Lie?

Video.summary: Bobbie says that her daughter Cindy’s home was filled with so many dangerous animals that she was forced to report her to child protective services because she felt her grandchild was in danger. But Cindy says Bobbie has another agenda!
Video.title: A Dangerous Household

Video.summary: Ashley’s first love, Chris, betrayed her for her sister and now faces abuse allegations.
Video.title: He Left Me For My Sister

Image.alt: He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister
He Left Me For My Sister

Video.summary: Keith has been accused of touching his 3-year-old son inappropriately by Crystal, the mother of his children, which he strongly denies. He says this is the result of her anger over an affair he had. But will the lie detector test prove him right?
Video.title: I Stand Accused

Video.summary: After Cassarah became Tim’s live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers’ parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?
Video.title: I Seduced My Teenage Nanny

Video.summary: A man takes a lie-detector test after being accused of hurting his girlfriend's child.
Video.title: You Failed Five Times?

Video.summary: When this young man says that he'd kill his own mother if the gang asked him to, Steve decides to hold an intervention. With the help of an ex-gang member, they try to speak some truth into this gangster from suburbia.
Video.title: Steve's Gang Intervention

Video.summary: Grace wants to expose ex-boyfriend Kenny for destroying her teen years and denying their child. Then, Kendra suspects boyfriend Brandon is cheating on her with his ex Monique, and she thinks he has the STD to prove it!
Video.title: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Image.alt: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
